name: Commoner

traits.name: Training
traits.text: The commoner has proficiency in one skill of the DM’s choice and has Advantage whenever it makes an ability check using that skill.

text:
# Commoner

*Medium or Small Humanoid, Neutral*

An ordinary person of the realm — farmer, crafter, or crowd-filler.

### Actions

**Club.** Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage.
